title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 393.1675 - Nonseverability clause
text:
393.1675.  Nonseverability clause. — Notwithstanding the provisions of section 1.140 to the contrary, the provisions of this act* shall be nonseverable, and if any provision is for any reason held to be invalid, such decision shall invalidate all of the remaining provisions of this act*.
(L. 2018 S.B. 564 § 1) 
* "This act" (S.B. 564, 2018) contained numerous sections.  Consult Disposition of Sections table for a definitive listing.
